action.reasoning: Observation: Best PESQ=3.134 (MG+ baseline), all custom models failed. Exploration revealed generator at model.enhance_model (1.9M params), compute_features = log1p(spectral_magnitude(compute_stft(wavs))). File read error was likely a specific file issue. Analysis: Fine-tuning MG+ generator is the most promising path. Need to: (1) extract STFT params from hparams, (2) build forward pipeline matching MG+, (3) fine-tune with MRSTFT+SI-SNR loss, (4) use small LR. Decision: Write comprehensive fine-tuning script, run for 15 epochs, evaluate.
